zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Scott於1454年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親William John Scott31歲，母親Agnes Beaufitz27歲。她於大約1475年與John Leeke II在英國英格蘭素福爾可卡爾頓 可爾維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1548年在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年94歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Scott于1454年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲William John Scott31岁，母亲Agnes Beaufitz27岁。她于大约1475年与John Leeke II在英国英格兰素福爾可卡爾頓 可爾維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1548年在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年94岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Scott was born in 1454, in Staffordshire, England, her father, William John Scott, was 31 and her mother, Agnes Beaufitz, was 27. She married John Leeke II about 1475, in Carlton Colville, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1548, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 94, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Scott est née en 1454, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William John Scott, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Beaufitz, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Leeke II environ 1475, à Carlton Colville, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1548, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Scott 1454 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William John Scott 31 und ihre Mutter Agnes Beaufitz 27. Sie hat um 1475 in Carlton Colville, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Leeke II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1548 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England und wurde in St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato John Leeke II circa 1475, nel Carlton Colville, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1548, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Scottが1454年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William John Scottは31歳，母Agnes Beaufitzは27歳であった。約1475年にイギリスイギリススフォルクカールトン コルヴィルでJohn Leeke IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1548年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで94歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshir: 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.Carlton, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 칼턴 비 사스먼드함
ko.lifeSummary: Margery Scott(이)가 1454년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William John Scott(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Beaufitz(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 칼턴 콜빌에서 John Leeke II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Scott nasceu em 1454, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William John Scott, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Beaufitz, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Leeke II aproximadamente 1475, em Carlton Colville, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1548, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Carlton, Suffolk, England: карлтон би саксмундхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Scott родилась в 1454 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William John Scott было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Beaufitz, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Leeke II около 1475 г. в местности карлтон колвилл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1548 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри'с чурч, стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.Carlton, Suffolk, England: Carlton by Saxmundham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Carlton Colville, Suffolk, England: Carlton Colville, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Carlton Colville, Suffolk, England, Unit: Carlton Colville, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Scott nació en 1454, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William John Scott, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes Beaufitz, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Leeke II aproximadamente 1475, en Carlton Colville, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1548, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
